name: German Government Bond Yield (~10y residual maturity Bundesbank daily)
notes: Bundesbank BBSIS — daily yield on outstanding domestic bearer debt securities residual maturity over 9 to 10 years (Umlaufsrendite). Distinct from FRED DEU_BUND_10Y (monthly OECD long-term rate); this is the fresher daily direct-source companion. Verified live 2026-05-28 (3.12%). SDMX-ML only.

name: German Government Bond Yield (1-2y residual maturity)
notes: Bundesbank BBSIS — yield on outstanding domestic bearer debt securities residual maturity over 1 to 2 years. Short end of the German curve. Verified live 2026-05-28 (2.68%).

name: Germany HICP Annual Inflation Rate
notes: Bundesbank BBDP1 — Harmonised Index of Consumer Prices Germany all-items YoY %-change. Verified live 2026-05-28 (2.9% @ 2026-04).

name: Germany HICP Index (All Items)
notes: Bundesbank BBDP1 — Harmonised Index of Consumer Prices Germany all-items index. Verified live 2026-05-28 (102.67 @ 2026-04).

name: Germany Unemployment Rate (Registered BA)
notes: Bundesbank BBDL1 — registered unemployment rate (Bundesagentur fuer Arbeit; sec. 16 SGB III) Germany. Verified live 2026-05-28 (6.4% @ 2026-04).
